sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITC 268 of 2003 ITC 250 of 2003 ITC 267 of 2003 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.245/2003 2. For hearing of main case 09.12.2025 Qazi Umair Ali advocate undertakes to file vakalatnama on behalf of respondent in ITC 267 and 268 of 2003. Let such vakalatnamas be filed in the office. These reference applications are pending since 2003 without any significant progress. Even today, 22 years later, applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with these matters. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
